headline: Here's How Many People Watched The 2024 Presidential Debate And How Fox Beat CNN At Its Own Game
summary: CNN set records with the 2024 presidential debate but may have watched a competitor top it in viewership.

headline: Costco The Landlord? Retailer Building 800-Unit Apartment Complex. Here's The Potential Reason Why.
summary: Costco is building a new store in Los Angeles that will include 800 apartments. Here's a look at the potential reasoning.

headline: Tesla Rises Ahead Of Crucial Q2 Deliveries, Rivian Affirms Goal After Volkswagen Deal, Nikola Ropes In Key Customer And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Rivian received a much-needed cash infusion, which will help the company move forward with next-gen platform plans.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Tesla, Microsoft, Microsoft, Dogecoin And Elon Musk Calls Out Boeing's CEO
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Microsoft's AI Chief Sparks Controversy, Says Open Web Content Is 'Freeware' Amid Lawsuits For Training AI Using Copyrighted Online Content
summary: Microsoft's head of AI division suggests open web content is freeware and can be copied by anyone, causing controversy and raising questions about AI companies' use of copyrighted material. Legal battles and regulation may be impacted.

headline: 'Trump Presidency Would…Be Bullish For Tesla, Negative For EVs,' Says Top Analyst After First Face-Off Between Biden And Ex-President
summary: Wedbush analyst and Tesla bull Dan Ives said on Friday that former President Donald Trump winning in the upcoming presidential elections could be a "silver lining positive" for the EV giant and its billionaire CEO Elon Musk.

headline: Tesla Loses Lead In EV Quality Among Peers: Auto Expert Pins It On Removal Of Stalks For Buttons
summary: EV giant Tesla has lost its edge in terms of vehicle quality over EVs made by rival OEMs, as per automotive industry consultant JD Power.

headline: Australian PM Slams Meta As Arrogant And Irresponsible, Urges Payment To News Outlets: 'They Should Fulfill The Commitments That They Had Previously Given'
summary: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese criticized Meta Platforms Inc. for its arrogant behavior and urged the company to continue paying local media organizations for their content, emphasizing its social responsibility.

headline: Meta's Ray-Ban Smart Glasses Face New Rival Powered By OpenAI's ChatGPT
summary: Solos set to launch AirGo Vision, smart glasses with Microsoft-backed OpenAI's GPT-4o AI model, challenging Meta's Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses.

headline: Jim Cramer Says Trump's Return To White House Could Be 'Good For Your Portfolio:' 'Hate Him Or Like Him'
summary: Jim Cramer shared his insights on the potential impact of a second Donald Trump presidency on the stock market.

headline: Ford's Jim Farley Embraces EVs, Exciting Rival Tesla CEO Elon Musk, But Report Says Nearly Half Of EV Owners In US Want To Switch Back To Gas
summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley on Friday wrote an article on X, detailing his long-standing love for gas vehicles and a newfound love for EVs, and rival CEO Elon Musk is excited. The sentiment, however, is not shared by EV owners across the U.S.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Says Meta Set To Unveil 'Full Holographic' Glasses: 'Every Person Who I've Shown It To So Far, Their Reaction Is Giddy'
summary: Meta Platforms is "almost ready" to unveil a new augmented reality prototype that has left early testers "giddy," according to CEO Mark Zuckerberg, who teased the full holographic glasses expected to debut at Meta's annual Connect conference this fall.
